taskDescription: Arrange the layers of deep cervical fascia from superficial to deep.
paragraphs: Investing layer — encircles the entire neck, encloses SCM and trapezius
Pretracheal fascia (muscular layer) — encloses the infrahyoid strap muscles
Pretracheal fascia (visceral layer) — encloses thyroid, trachea, and oesophagus
Carotid sheath — contains common carotid artery, IJV, and vagus nerve
Prevertebral fascia — covers prevertebral muscles and forms the axillary sheath
